import { Meta } from "@storybook/blocks";
import { Badge, Button, Card, Section, Tabs } from "../../index";
import { CodeBlock, DocsPage, PropsTable } from "../internal";

<Meta title="Themes/Overview" />

<DocsPage
  title="Theme System"
  status="stable"
  description="O sistema de temas aplica design tokens por CSS variables. A troca de tema no topo desta pagina afeta todos os exemplos abaixo."
>
  <Section title="Temas Disponiveis" description="Temas prontos para diferentes contextos de produto.">
    <div className="ak-docs-grid">
      {["light", "dark", "corporate", "minimal", "soft", "terminal"].map((theme) => (
        <Card key={theme} title={theme} description="Tema pronto consumido pelo AtomKitProvider." variant="outlined">
          <div className="ak-docs-row">
            <Badge variant="info">tokens</Badge>
            <Button size="sm" variant="outline">Preview</Button>
          </div>
        </Card>
      ))}
    </div>
  </Section>

  <Section title="Tokens Customizaveis">
    <PropsTable
      rows={[
        { name: "colors.primary", type: "string", description: "Cor principal para acoes e destaques." },
        { name: "colors.secondary", type: "string", description: "Cor secundaria para composicoes." },
        { name: "colors.background", type: "string", description: "Plano de fundo da aplicacao." },
        { name: "colors.surface", type: "string", description: "Superficie de cards, tabelas e paineis." },
        { name: "colors.text", type: "string", description: "Cor principal de texto." },
        { name: "colors.border", type: "string", description: "Bordas e divisores." },
        { name: "radius", type: "string", description: "Raio base dos componentes." },
        { name: "spacing", type: "string", description: "Unidade base de espacamento." },
        { name: "shadow", type: "string", description: "Sombra padrao." },
        { name: "fontFamily", type: "string", description: "Familia tipografica." },
        { name: "density", type: '"compact" | "comfortable"', description: "Densidade dos componentes." },
      ]}
    />
  </Section>

  <Section title="Uso e Customizacao">
    <Tabs
      items={[
        {
          id: "theme",
          label: "Troca de Tema",
          content: (
            <CodeBlock title="AtomKitProvider">
{`<AtomKitProvider theme="terminal">
  <Button>Executar</Button>
</AtomKitProvider>`}
            </CodeBlock>
          ),
        },
        {
          id: "override",
          label: "Override",
          content: (
            <CodeBlock title="Override parcial">
{`<AtomKitProvider
  theme="corporate"
  tokens={{
    colors: {
      primary: "#0f766e",
      primaryHover: "#115e59",
    },
    radius: "10px",
    density: "compact",
  }}
>
  <Card title="Customizado">
    <Button>Salvar</Button>
  </Card>
</AtomKitProvider>`}
            </CodeBlock>
          ),
        },
      ]}
    />
  </Section>
</DocsPage>
